abcd.data_reading_timeout_note: in ms, the timeout of the inner data fetching loop

dgtzs.ChannelEnableMask_note: the binary mask to enable the channels reading
dgtzs.TriggerEnableMask_note: the binary mask to enable the triggering of the channels
dgtzs.PostTriggerSamples_note: the number of samples in the waveform after the trigger, must be a multiple of 4
dgtzs.SWTriggerMode_note: source of trigger, with 1 it is from the channels

ch0.DCOffsetPercent_note: values from -50 to +50, should be negative for negative signals, positive for positive signals
ch0.TriggerThreshold_note: absolute ADC value, not relative to the baseline
